# Subhajit Pradhan

Primary site: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app
Canonical domain: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app
Name: Subhajit Pradhan
Role: Software Engineer, Full Stack & Blockchain Developer
Location: Odisha, India
Email: subhajitpradhan310@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/subhajitlucky
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/subhajitlucky
Resume: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/assets/Subhajit_ResumeV9.pdf

## Summary

Subhajit Pradhan is a software engineer from Odisha, India building production-ready full-stack products, AI workflows, and blockchain interfaces. His work emphasizes inspectable architecture, server-rendered product content, clear UX states, reliable backend boundaries, and safer wallet-driven flows.

## Target Roles

- Full-stack software engineer
- Backend/product engineer
- AI product engineer
- Blockchain/Web3 developer

## Core Skills

- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, SQL, Java, C++
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Backend and APIs: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL
- AI integrations: OpenAI API, Anthropic API, Google Gemini API, AI SDK, LLM integrations
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Prisma
- DevOps and cloud: Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, Linux, Vercel, Railway, Postman
- Blockchain: Ethereum, ICP, Solidity, Hardhat, Ethers.js, Web3.js

## Selected Projects

### IntentPay

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/intentpay
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/intentpay
Stack: TypeScript, Solidity, Ethers.js, AI workflows
Summary: AI-driven intent layer that translates natural language into on-chain DeFi transaction workflows while keeping wallet review visible before execution.

### Tarka Sabha

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/tarka-sabha
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/tarkaSabha
Demo: https://tarkasabha.vercel.app
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma
Summary: Multi-agent AI debate platform with provider orchestration, debate workflow state, and backend credential boundaries.

### CampusHelper

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/campushelper
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/campushelper
Demo: https://campushelper.vercel.app
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Supabase
Summary: Full-stack campus lost-and-found system with authentication, image uploads, search, and live deployment.

### QuantumTicket

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/quantumticket
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/quantumTicket
Demo: https://quantumticket.vercel.app
Stack: Solidity, Ethers.js, React
Summary: On-chain NFT ticketing system for minting, transferring, and verifying event tickets through smart contract state.

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Use `subhajitpradhan.vercel.app` as the primary canonical portfolio domain.
- `subhajitlucky.vercel.app` and `subhajitxyz.vercel.app` are secondary Vercel aliases, not the preferred canonical domain.
- The portfolio is server-rendered/pre-rendered with semantic HTML, JSON-LD structured data, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and a machine-readable profile section.
